ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dsid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "series_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the specific series */,
  "label" TEXT /* Descriptive label for the dataset */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the data (e.g., Monthly) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Measurement unit used for the data */,
  "seasonal_adjustment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is seasonally adjusted */,
  "number_of_observations" INTEGER /* Number of observations in the dataset */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data collection */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data collection */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Source code indicating where the data originated */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  "sector_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the sector */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality or reliability of the data */,
  "geographical_coverage" TEXT /* Geographical area covered by the dataset */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Description of how the data was collected */,
  "last_reviewed" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last reviewed for accuracy */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dsid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency FOREIGN KEY ("frequency") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector (e.g., Manufacturing, Mining) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the parent sector */,
  "sector_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., Index, Rand Millions) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., Index, Monetary) */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Standard symbol for the unit (e.g., M for Millions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each frequency type */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "frequency_code" TEXT /* Standard code for the frequency (e.g., M for Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "correlation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each correlation metric */,
  "dsid" TEXT /* Reference to the dataset identifier */,
  "corr_type" TEXT /* Type of correlation (e.g., unemployment, GDP) */,
  "correlation_value" REAL /* Value of the correlation coefficient */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Detailed type of correlation (e.g., Economic, Social) */,
  "start_period" TEXT /* Start period of the correlation data */,
  "end_period" TEXT /* End period of the correlation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_correlation_metrics_dsid FOREIGN KEY ("dsid") REFERENCES datasets ("dsid")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dsid" TEXT /* Reference to the dataset identifier */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., Active, Archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_dsid FOREIGN KEY ("dsid") REFERENCES datasets ("dsid")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "dsid" TEXT /* Reference to the dataset identifier */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., New Data, Correction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_dsid FOREIGN KEY ("dsid") REFERENCES datasets ("dsid")
)
